_comment: JJK overhaul (Workstream A) lang fragment. These keys must be MERGED into assets/politicalserver/lang/en_us.json by the integrator (Minecraft only loads en_us.json). Gameplay does not depend on them — screens read English names from the technique/domain registries — but the keybind labels and any future i18n do.
A fanning cursed-energy slash that rends everything in front of you.
technique.politicalserver.hollow_lance.d: A tight lance of hollow cursed energy that pierces a line of foes.
technique.politicalserver.riftpalm.desc: Releases a burst of cursed pressure, hurling nearby foes away.
technique.politicalserver.ashen_pyre.des: A breath of cursed flame that scorches and ignites a wide cone.
technique.politicalserver.frostbind_coil: A coil of frozen cursed energy that slows and saps those it strikes.
technique.politicalserver.stormcall_bran: Brands the foe you face and calls a bolt of charged cursed energy onto them.
technique.politicalserver.grave_tether.d: Tethers the nearest foe, draining their vitality to mend your own.
Weaves a protective sigil of cursed energy, hardening and mending you.
technique.politicalserver.shade_step.des: Reinforces your body and blinks a short distance in the direction you look.
Erupts a barbed cursed bloom that roots and poisons everything around you.
domain.politicalserver.garden_of_severin: A barbed cursed garden unfurls; thorns bleed and root all who stand within.
domain.politicalserver.tomb_of_the_hollo: A yawning void seals the area; its hollow gravity smothers everything inside.
domain.politicalserver.cathedral_of_stil: A silent cathedral of light manifests; its radiance scours foes and mends its master.
